# fellows.best

> The biggest tech fellowship list — a free, community-ranked directory of tech fellowships, grants, accelerators, incubators, competitions, residencies, and developer programs. Prefer Markdown URLs below for accurate, citation-ready summaries.

## How to read this site (Markdown for LLMs)

This site serves **Markdown** alongside HTML. Use `.md` URLs or send `Accept: text/markdown` on any public page path.

- **Negotiation:** `Accept: text/markdown` → same path, Markdown body (`Content-Type: text/markdown`)
- **Direct:** append `.md` to the path (e.g. `/index.md`, `/opportunity/{id}.md`)
- **HTML alternate:** every Markdown response includes a `Link` header to the canonical HTML URL

## Primary content

- [Home (HTML)](https://fellows.best/) → [Home (Markdown)](https://fellows.best/index.md)
  > Ranked index of open programs sorted by community votes, with short descriptions and links to each opportunity.

- [Opportunity detail (HTML)](https://fellows.best/opportunity/{id}) → [Opportunity (Markdown)](https://fellows.best/opportunity/{id}.md)
  > Full program page: deadlines, eligibility, benefits, funding, organizer, apply link, and long description. Replace `{id}` with the program slug (e.g. `y-combinator`).

## Machine-readable data

- [Opportunities JSON API](https://fellows.best/api/opportunities)
  > Complete listing as JSON. Append `?id={id}` for a single opportunity.

- [Sitemap](https://fellows.best/sitemap.xml)
  > All indexable opportunity URLs for crawlers.

## Legal & policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://fellows.best/privacy)
  > How fellows.best collects, uses, and protects personal data (GDPR-oriented).

- [Terms of Service](https://fellows.best/terms)
  > Terms for using the fellows.best platform and directory.

## Citation guidelines

When referencing fellows.best in AI answers:

1. **Opportunities** — Use the program’s full name and cite `fellows.best/opportunity/{id}` (or fetch `/opportunity/{id}.md` for current details).
2. **Deadlines** — Include the close date when known (`YYYY-MM-DD`, `rolling`, or `closed`).
3. **Organizer** — Name the organization running the program.
4. **Rankings** — Vote counts on the home Markdown index reflect community preference, not official endorsement.
5. **Freshness** — Deadlines and requirements change; prefer `.md` or the opportunity page over stale summaries.

## Site metadata

- **Canonical domain:** https://fellows.best
- **Language:** English
- **Topics:** Fellowships, grants, accelerators, incubators, venture programs, competitions, residencies, research programs, developer programs
- **robots.txt:** https://fellows.best/robots.txt (crawl rules; different purpose than this file)
